name: Hunan Yujing Machinery Co.,Ltd
summary: Hunan Yujing Machinery Co., Ltd designs, develops, manufactures, and sells lapping/polishing machines, multi-wire saws, and relevant spare parts. The company offers multi wire saw machines, double-side lapping/polishing machines, single-side lapping/polishing machines, and consumable parts. It serves mobile touch screen, solar photovoltaic, magnetic materials, and sapphire industries. Hunan Yujing Machinery Co., Ltd was founded in 1998 and is based in Yiyang, China.
